templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://chromeindustries.com/pages/size-charts

templates.name: Which bags are made in the USA?
templates.content: All of our bags are now made with trusted manufacturing partners overseas, mainly Thailand and China. We hold their work in high esteem.

templates.name: Is the Kadet Max ambidextrous?
templates.content: Yes, the Kadet Max is indeed ambidextrous. Both the main shoulder strap and the stabilizer strap can be swapped to accommodate left or right shoulder carry.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Once we receive your return, it can take 10-12 business days for our warehouse to process your refund. We'll send you a confirmation via email when your return has been refunded to the original payment method.

templates.name: What zipper do you use?
templates.content: All of the zippers we use across all of our products are YKK.

templates.name: Do your shoes run wide?
templates.content: The Kursk TR can accommodate wider feet and fits true to size. However, the rest of our footwear runs narrower - between a B and a C width.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.chromeindustries.com/warranty/

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: What is the max/min size the Tensile Hip Pack can adjust to?
templates.content: The Tensile Hip Pack's min-max circumference is 28"-51".

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://chromeindustries.com/pages/faq#returns

templates.name: Do any of your bags have a carbon liner or carbon lined pocket?
templates.content: None of our products have a carbon liner, carbon lined pocket, or other charcoal/carbon odor reducing materials.

templates.name: Maximum strap length of the 22X Kadet
templates.content: The Kadet's maximum strap circumference is 56 inches.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@chromeindustries.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@chromeindustries.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do you send stickers with every order?
templates.content: Each new product should come with a single sticker (attached with the hangtag). We also offer a Sticker Pack for $5 that has 10 stickers and you can check it out here - https://www.chromeindustries.com/product/chrome-sticker-pack/AC-219.html?dwvar_AC-219_color=MULT&dwvar_AC-219_size=NA&cgid=accessories

templates.name: Material composition of the 22X Kadet Sling
templates.content: The Kadet is made from 22x nylon shell with tpx durable laminate technology and 70d poly liner.

templates.name: What is the difference between the Buran III and the Citizen?
templates.content: The Citizen is the OG messenger bag that features an open main compartment, and a few smaller pockets under the front flap. The Buran III is more built out for the professional commuter, it has additional pockets, a haul loop, a built-in padded laptop sleeve in the back panel, and a fully detachable and reversible shoulder strap for right or left shoulder carry.

templates.name: What is the Dima 1.0 made of? Can I dye it?
templates.content: The Dima 1.0 is made with a fire hose canvas upper. You could dye it using any method suitable for canvas.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: All orders from the website ship from our third party warehouse in Vacaville, CA.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't have phone support right now but I'm more than happy to help, let me know what I can do.

templates.name: Can you attach a stabilizer strap to a mini kadet?
templates.content: Unfortunately, the stabilizer strap is not compatible with a mini Kadet.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We aim to ship orders by the end of the next business day. During sale periods or over holiday weekends, shipping may take an extra business day. We usually ship via UPS and DHL, and once shipped it will take 4-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: If an item you bought on our site goes on sale within 5 days of purchase, we'll refund the price difference to the original form of payment or with credit. Price adjustments don't stack with promotional codes - we'll provide a partial refund. A receipt must be present to honor a price adjustment. Final sale items aren't eligible for a price adjustment and any items adjusted to final sale prices can't be returned. Please reach out to us at support@chromeindustries.com with your order number and we'll sort out any adjustments.

templates.name: Dimensions of the Urban Ex Rolltop 30L
templates.content: The Urban ex rolltop 30L is 18'' tall, 15.75'' wide and 6'' deep.

templates.name: Does the full size Kadet have a hidden pocket under the U-lock holster?
templates.content: The full size Kadet doesn't have a hidden pocket under the U-lock holster.

templates.name: Do you do repairs?
templates.content: Our stores which also served as our repair centers are permanently closed. Regrettably, we're no longer able to offer any repair services. We recommend hitting up a local tailor or gear repair shop for assistance with a repair.

templates.name: Store location / Retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://chromeindustries.attn.tv/sl/0D2nAWrL

templates.name: Is the Mini Kadet sling reflective?
templates.content: The only Mini Kadet with reflective materials is the black tarp color that has reflective compression straps on the bottom.

templates.name: Are your HUB locations still making custom products?
templates.content: We've closed all our HUB locations and no longer have a customs program. We can't offer any custom products or customization on our gear for the foreseeable future.

templates.name: Will the Urban Ex Rolltop 30L fit under an airline seat?
templates.content: The Urban ex rolltop 30L is too big to fit under a seat as a personal item, but it should fit easily as a carry-on! We recommend checking with your airline for their bag limits.

templates.name: Care instructions / washing
templates.content: Our bags aren't machine washable as these washing appliances may twist and pull our gear in ways that permanently damage the bag. The official material cleaning instructions for ballistic nylon and tarp are to first treat them with a dry solvent, followed by a spray cleaner or detergent and water. Avoid chlorine or bleach based cleansers. We recommend cleaning and drying the metal parts after you clean the rest of the bag to prevent rust. Less officially, it never hurts to burn some sage to promote bag healing. Following that, we recommend using simple green (or other mild solvent) on the affected areas, then give the bag a warm and soapy bath in dawn or a similar dish-washing liquid. A nylon brush or cloth will help scrub and lift any stains. Once you're done, pull the liner inside out until dry.

templates.name: Can the small Niko Camera Cube fit into the loops of your messenger bags?
templates.content: The Niko camera cube SM will still be able to strap into the velcro loops on the interior of our messenger bags, but only one loop at a time - it's not wide enough to span both loops at once like the Niko MD will.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/accounts/login/?next=/chrome_industries/  and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/chromeindustries.hq/

templates.name: Shoe size
templates.content: In the Pedal & Pro series shoes (the Kursk, Dima and Southside) we suggest going down a half-size from a true Brannock Device size. For example, if you were a US Men's 10 in some brands, you'd want a 9.5 in ours shoes. The 415 Workboot is an exception - it fits true to the Brannock Device size. Please note, all our shoes are slightly narrow, with a fit between a B and C. Each half-size in US Men's is equal to about 1/6th of an inch in length and an 1/8th of an inch of width across the ball of the foot.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@chromeindustries.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $110. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Do you price match?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we don't price match any other seller or other colors. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Do you make SPD shoes?
templates.content: Our PRO series shoes that are SPD/2-bolt cleat compatible are back and you can check them out here: https://www.chromeindustries.com/spd-clipless-bike-shoes/

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes or APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: I'm afraid we cannot deliver to PO Boxes, APO or FPO addresses.

templates.name: Sizing Apparel
templates.content: Happy to help! Each apparel product page has specific sizing information available by scrolling down and selecting Specs or Size Guide. I'd recommend looking there for measurements and if you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content:
To set up a free return in the US, first sign in to your account using the email from your order here: https://shopify.com/56707678268/account

In your account order history select the order. Select the item/s that you want to return and choose a reason. Click Request return.

Once your return request is approved, you will receive an email with further instructions. We aim to process returns within 12 business days of receipt at our warehouse. You will receive notification via email that your refund has been completed.
